# Irish Fertility Trends — Vega-Lite Visualization

Interactive visualization exploring fertility trends in Ireland by age group and region, built with Vega-Lite as part of my MSc in Social Data Science at UCD.

👉 [Open the interactive chart in the Vega Editor](https://vega.github.io/editor/#/url/vega--awAYRgNEE3hhIycZGRIRBkRwEP6-UhGygcig9imoBgvNk--omOwZx6dB8ztHRsw-EoMimFMIAYviWTrGUJS4hCLRKSpiGYH06AaUgMKCAEsi2o0lEId4RRIDSTEsU5IAUpEabGIxCG8oI7TnCKdEvPIkFaBANyapgDAIJQpUMOV1iXgNVgAORuB4sRDesmzbPMADEE6ZBi6TpAMShTTs+jCEqmAgkglVPEgUBYXVcgNYk5wtW19idd1ZXfv1g0je4ng+BNq1bOtqAYgha1ZZQABsNkgJ4FgmIKIDIMYxbnZ5G1OOo--zFHaYx8JSuCYlFQp5hljp3sOoLknJs4KFAO1bUup9T6CNHgQg3pzSWjINaTK9p-ZOhdG6D0mAvQ+j9IGEMYZiDVj+t4GACB+wAE14yxgALL4kHMGYgCBIxrjYAYFUUA6HGHSDQBYDBdgqiYDgWQkgbDeDqMGP6vx-Q2AYJITIkYyD8AAKqCHUbkCka5qgjgpBYOhVDvD4jofwNcEBtBkDEHQtcdCmCSDjMeZg55uiXlCk+Ns+IxAqjfB+OAX4fxwD-NcK4mAgIQBAhPcCxQm4RzgoDb8Xh861nJiXUGNMroIEmENTMqjdjVCsCqWwCQ5BDXBFYAAhA9Uaz1vATTvsXSm6SQDl2yUEEI4Q2RlMqQ9BESJARwAgENKwQcQD8kEFABgnhM7oCWKsJml5hr---lxkSTNMgJwQUjknJCuFTVJzIrhRNTi9Y5LpVRSUJKil+J1gaq1V5kAxqtV+aUIAAFJItRei+F9Y-z9RAqTR2iFmIxDQqpbC9YDKcBMq2DawzKbOXct5ZlpQVqHDyeS5yp1LrSTRWFl4YIQUZrJzgDCEo6wWtQCgGIKAmROuyXxLkJgYgBvpD+m2JAGJOs9EpaFTrSA4ALXSErOaSBlvLSUDNAwO3dsDe671-rW3cjjcm9Nrb81FrLTAUDftvbIIge7DQLoxRygQAsAgJesGKKoZAK+6mG7iqVaM2QJTdb5iqdvqAhpkDzh6gNBgbA8DTRIKtDaO0DpMEXOwXAT03pfQEADEGUM4ZSHkMoTQ+hjD+zMNYewzh3DeH8MEcI0R4jJHSNkfIxRyi1EaMEFonReiDFGJMWYixVibF2IcbGJxZ4LxuPSB4rxPj3wZU-HjIJ-5QnhMicraJ0M4kRPgnpPOpNUlNOpi0-VornnlKqa8vpzIrmjPGZM6Z8w5krDVUNZZAzVldKsJs0NNvw212567Z05sr8UKrDXssVPv3lOYy3Ki18XAX5btYVyFaWYX8r9YKzqyKw9osT656PNLhmx9D-H8PD0POFJT-iul2XctImB9nrlaWSv54RSHoVxfa+l-ryamV5qCWKoH8qofLz1WOdNU3yvE+4+otn0NELJyXWp6D8NcrIQO8csdWl2rcKC-us9cYb1vr-VwEDQdENK+SUxujcNONLQE0H87U1hpGb0mgGzRWkLNWvcCWnXMOqOm2BOhgDrNOrOuzA3IbvMMIMPOsDgNjGmGgJrgjBEMjKjCOujKUMbGvKuqAOurepulQmCiRvoN5Cen5PFD-JQSMPzLFMBghqBuBhRPBqlEholOUD9K2izEdsFKFB1koCzEFizH9OsCzG2DIfiJAfIW2GISIW2JIQodIeIQoXIVofePIfiCoSFPiOofiJoSIQoQ5uqJYSoWUJkEFrYWYbYToSAGUDeA5hiDYQtPYQtI4QtM4RFMIRFJ4c5tnAhOhqAJhu4BQDhggHhhrNvPeo+s+sppHGRoJLHPHG3Kwc1NRu0kxixjQGxhxn-NxoAi1PxiYEJiJlYGJrEbIGSGZAzE5JroDNVDJoDvoJ-qmk1ikZDvQWJIlBAv7PlE1B8JHvZkoEnp8vYeXu5vPpSu5qPmFsFvPs+P5iagSOsDFtsXFgColgVofqlulnyg0Z8Iysyl0UVt3hlnVmVtapcUfs6rinVtyETE1u8CAC1rju1vtj1n1gNkgENiNmNhNlNjNt4HNptp8YtstqtpdktJ1rtntsdgdv8cdqdmCRdutldhyOpj-FpmsrpvpkliDgHmCFCHdk5KAI9s9nQChgkofE7KknekwUuuDjQcYD5KegwfMKyemgkZcWDtxBDv7HQVxLkbbuyA0pEdhiPHEeQcVIRkkdQbxGkR-JRuKRpvoAENUGHCAnXCKMxGbDqJyEAA/view)

## What this shows
- Comparison of Ireland's total fertility rate (TFR) against other European countries from 1970 to 2024
- Age-specific fertility rates by NUTS 3 region, broken down by childbearing age group (early, typical, late)
- Trends over time across all regions, with an interactive toggle between "all ages" and "by childbearing age group" views

## Objective of the visualization 
The visualization highlights how Ireland's fertility patterns have shifted over five decades, both in international comparison and across regions, with a particular focus on the shift toward later childbearing.

## Tools
Vega-Lite, Google Sheets (data source)
